brand.description: Motorcycle leaders in the Caribbean and Latin America. Over 15 years of innovation, reliability and exceptional service for those who live on two wheels.

footer.copyright: Super Tucán Motors. All rights reserved.

adriSport.subtitle: PURE SPORT POWER
adriSport.description: Aggressive design, 125cc of pure adrenaline and the technology that defines a new era of motorcycling in the Caribbean.

cg200.subtitle: FOR ALL TERRAIN AND EVERY OCCASION
cg200.description: The durability you need, the power you deserve. 200cc ready to conquer any road.

bws.subtitle: THE CITY IS YOUR TRACK
bws.description: Compact design, automatic and ready to conquer the urban jungle with style and efficiency.

expansion.title: Super Tucán expands its dealer network in Central America

maintenance.title: Maintenance program: your bike, always ready
maintenance.excerpt: Discover the service plans designed to make your Super Tucán last longer.

models.title: MODELS
models.description: Discover the full lineup of Super Tucán vehicles. Choose your next adventure from our models designed for every style.

hero.title: MORE THAN A BRAND
hero.description: We are passion for mobility, innovation in every detail, and commitment to those who choose freedom on two wheels.

history.title: OUR STORY
history.p1: Since our beginnings, Super Tucán has been synonymous with quality, innovation and passion for two wheels. We started as a dream of offering accessible and reliable mobility for everyone.
history.p2: Today, we are leaders in the motorcycle and scooter market in the Caribbean and Latin America, always committed to excellence and customer satisfaction.
history.missionText: To provide high-quality two-wheeled vehicles that connect people with their destinations, combining advanced technology, exceptional design, and unmatched customer service.

values.title: OUR VALUES
values.description: The principles that guide every decision and keep us connected to our customers.

quality.title: QUALITY
quality.description: Every Super Tucán vehicle undergoes rigorous quality controls to guarantee durability, safety, and exceptional performance.

innovation.title: INNOVATION
innovation.description: We constantly evolve our designs and technology to deliver the best possible riding experience.

community.title: COMMUNITY
community.description: More than customers, we are a family. We build lasting relationships based on trust and mutual respect.

cta.title: READY TO JOIN?
cta.description: Discover why thousands of people trust Super Tucán for their daily adventures.

hero.title: FIND YOUR DEALER
